reasoning.name: Reasoning & Decision-Making
reasoning.description: Boros forms decisions through structured reasoning processes that transform available information (inputs, memory, constraints) into coherent, goal-directed actions. Reasoning operates independently of external retrieval and focuses on how decisions are derived.

web_search.name: Web Search & Knowledge Retrieval
web_search.description: Boros retrieves external information from the web to supplement internal knowledge. Web search focuses on identifying knowledge gaps, acquiring relevant information, and validating source quality before use.
